notes:
Offline Recipe Browser: Recipes you've browsed before now load instantly — even when you're offline or on a flaky connection. No more staring at an empty list. A manual refresh button lets you pull the latest from the cloud whenever you're ready.

 Recipe Re-run: You can now re-run any previous recipe execution directly from the run info modal. Your original parameters are pre-filled and editable, so you can tweak inputs and re-run with a single click — no need to set everything up from scratch. Progress is tracked in the background just like the first run.

 Recipe Run History: Every recipe execution is now tracked with its parameters, status, and timing. This powers the re-run feature and gives you a clear record of what ran, when, and with what inputs.

 Recipe Run Deletion: Deleting a recipe run now does a thorough cleanup — all generated sheets, charts, and dashboards from that run are removed, and any charts you had pinned to your own dashboards are cleaned up gracefully instead of leaving broken placeholders.

 Bug Fixes: Fixed several internal data-handling issues that could cause recipe run timestamps to display incorrectly, recipe deletions to silently fail, or older recipes to produce duplicate outputs when re-run.
